title: Send email at specified time in date column

posts.author: Tijs (Tijs Metternich)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!

It would be great if the automation: ‘When (date) arrives’ would have the option to use the specified time in that particular column.

We are a training company and we send an automated email to our trainees when the session is ending. This time differs, so I would love to able to not add a time at all and that the automation just uses the time that is in the column.

Kind regards,

Tijs

posts.author: workflowboost (Bartosz @ Workflow Boost)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey! While this isn’t a native feature in monday yet, you can use the Advanced Time Triggers app to set up actions based on dates and times saved in a date column.

image1458×593 68.5 KB

The triggers are available in the automation builder, allowing you to create custom automations to trigger any action you need.
